headline: Shorter-Term Treasury Yields Extend Gains
summary: Shorter-term Treasury yields climbed, lifted by investors’ worries that the Iran war is boosting inflation and lowering the chances of interest-rate cuts any time soon.

raw.headline: Shorter-Term Treasury Yields Extend Gains
raw.summary: Shorter-term Treasury yields climbed, lifted by investors’ worries that the Iran war is boosting inflation and lowering the chances of interest-rate cuts any time soon.

headline: NDAQ Outperforms Industry, Trades at a Discount: How to Play the Stock
summary: Nasdaq is set to grow on its increasing non-trading revenue base, organic expansion and strategic acquisitions, supported by a solid capital position.

headline: ICE Stock Trading at a Discount to Industry at 20.03X: Time to Hold?
summary: Intercontinental Exchange rides on the growth of data services, the strength of its mortgage network and strategic buyouts, although higher expenses may weigh on margins.

headline: Traders now see little chance of an interest rate cut this year following Fed decision
summary: All of the positive economic talk out of this week's Federal Reserve meeting had a negative impact on investors
